app.name: Vestium
badge.emb.hint: Embedded textures to optimize: {issues} — see Model details
badge.heavy.hint: High LOD above 40,000 polygons — consider optimizing the mesh
badge.noLod.hint: No distant LOD (med/low/vlow) — the model stays expensive from afar
badge.oversize.hint: Texture dictionary above the streaming limit (16 MB)
badge.sameLod.hint: Distant LODs are present but identical to the high LOD (no gain) — decimate them from the preview
badge.tex.hint: Textures to optimize: {issues} — see the Textures section
behaviourFlag.bulky.hint: Removes the garment in some cars (stays on motorcycles). For items too bulky in vehicles.
behaviourFlag.defaultHelmet.hint: Keeps the helmet on motorcycles (prevents automatic replacement). Often combined with "Random helmet".
behaviourFlag.flightHelmet.hint: Keeps the item in some helicopters or planes.
behaviourFlag.hideInFirstPerson.hint: Hides the item in first-person (avoids blocking the view).
behaviourFlag.lightlyArmoured.hint: Reduces fall damage (especially off a motorcycle). Often helmets.
behaviourFlag.notInCar.hint: Removes the item in vehicles (large hats, backpacks…). Reappears on exit.
behaviourFlag.pilotHelmet.hint: Prevents the item from being removed in planes, jets or helicopters.
behaviourFlag.randomHelmet.hint: Adds the helmet to the random motorcycle pool. Usually paired with "Motorcycle helmet".
behaviourFlag.usePhysicsHat.hint: Applies physics to the item (hat flies off when dismounting a motorcycle).
build.checksRunning: Texture checks in progress (size, dimensions)… the build will be unlocked once finished.
build.dialog.title: Build the FiveM resource
build.pickOutput.title: Choose the resource output folder
build.replace.hint: The pack will replace this R* DLC’s garments in game. Use with full knowledge of the consequences.
build.running.hint: Copying stream files, generating YMT/metas… follow the detail in the Console (Ctrl+L).
build.validationBlocked: The project contains {count} validation error(s) — fix them before building.
build.warning.positionHole: {n} unoccupied position(s) filled with a placeholder (YMT/file alignment)
build.warning.slotOverflow: {n} slot(s) beyond 128 drawables — the game will ignore the excess (replace mode).
build.warning.slotSplit: A slot exceeds 128 drawables: pack automatically split into several collections.
bundle.dialog.addRefused: Pack refused: name or target DLC already in use
bundle.dialog.gen9Hint: For each replacement pack, the DLC’s reserved Gen9 positions are detected from your GTA V installation and locked automatically — no garment can ever land on a dead slot.
bundle.dialog.gtaPathRequired: GTA V path not configured (Settings) — cannot detect the Gen9 dummies of the DLC to replace.
bundle.dialog.intro: A bundle groups several packs (addon or R* DLC replacement) in a single project, built together at build time. Packs must be pre-created here — you can add more later via "Manage packs".
bundle.dialog.name: Bundle name
bundle.dialog.nameTaken: This pack name is already taken
bundle.dialog.title: New bundled pack
bundle.import.allRejected: Import impossible: no pack has free space
bundle.import.noPack: This bundle has no packs: create one before importing
bundle.import.overflow: {count} garment(s) overflowed to pack "{name}" (target pack full)
bundle.import.rejected: {count} garment(s) rejected: no pack has free space in this slot
bundle.manage.notBundle: This project is not a bundle — packs are managed in a bundled pack
bundle.manage.removeBlocked: Move or delete this pack’s garments first
bundle.packSelect.hint: Displayed pack — imports go into this pack (automatic overflow)
bundle.reimport.badCollection: Unreadable resource collection — invalid DLC/collection name
bundle.reimport.dlcTaken: A pack already replaces the DLC "{dlc}" — only one pack per DLC
bundle.reimport.nameTaken: A pack named "{name}" already exists in the bundle
bundle.reimport.noLocks: Gen9 locks unavailable (GTA V path not configured) — the pack will be imported without reservations
bundle.reimport.noneFound: No FiveM resource found in the selection (stream/ folder + YMT expected)
bundle.reimport.pickMany: Select one or more packs (or a folder containing packs)
bundle.reimport.refused: Re-import refused: the collection is already present in the bundle
bundle.reopenUnavailable: Classic reopening is not available in a bundle — use "Re-import a resource"
bundle.setAside.name: Set aside
bundle.setAside.redistributePartial: {replaced} re-placed, {remaining} with no available space (create a pack or free up slots)
bundle.setAside.rowHint: Garment set aside ({reason}) — it could not be placed. Move it to a pack or delete it.
closeGuard.title: Unsaved changes
command.duplicateToOtherGender: Duplication to the other gender ({count} item(s))
console.gen9.done: Gen9 dummies: {slots} reserved slot(s) across {packs} pack(s) ({source})
console.gen9.started: Scanning Gen9 dummies from the GTA V installation…
console.revealItem: Click to reveal the garment in the list
console.title: Console
details.empty: Select an item to view its details.
details.files.physics.hint: Cloth physics file (.yld). Attached to the garment, it is copied at build and enables clothData.ownsCloth in the YMT.
details.files.physics.title: Physics (.yld)
details.textures.addDummy.hint: Reserves the next variation letter without a file (like DCT) — the letter is counted in the YMT and the shop meta, replaceable later
details.textures.embedded.hint: Preview with the model's embedded textures
details.textures.photoshop.hint: Exports the image and opens it in Photoshop (or the default editor) — every save updates the pack texture and the preview.
details.textures.sort.hint: Reorders the textures by filename (the a/b/c… letters in the build follow the list order)
dialog.addDummy.title: Add a reservation dummy
dialog.autosave.message:
An autosave newer than the project file exists.
Do you want to restore it?
dialog.autosave.title: Automatic recovery
dialog.backup.title: Backup restore
dialog.duplicates.intro: {count} file(s) with content identical to assets already in the project.
dialog.duplicates.title: Duplicates detected
dialog.importProgress.title: Import in progress…
dialog.importResolve.intro: {count} file(s) could not be resolved automatically. Fill in the fields, then import.
dialog.importResolve.title: Import resolution
dialog.newProject.location: The project will be created in: {path}
dialog.newProject.name: Name (slug)
dialog.newProject.nameHint: Lowercase letters, digits and _ — 3 to 50 characters.
dialog.newProject.nameInvalid: Invalid name: lowercase letters, digits and _ (3 to 50 characters).
dialog.newProject.title: New project
dialog.unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
duplicates.clonesOnly.hint: Hide same-model garments that only differ by their textures (retextured variants).
duplicates.exclusions.hint: These groups no longer show up in the analysis. Restore one to see it in the list again.
duplicates.exclusions.title: Ignored duplicates
duplicates.ignore: Ignore this group (intentional duplicate — managed in the exclusions)
duplicates.ignored: Group "{name}" ignored — manage it via the Exclusions button.
duplicates.keep: Keep this one — replace the others with dummies
duplicates.merge: Merge every texture into this one (the others become dummies)
duplicates.none: No duplicates: all {analyzed} garments have a unique model.
duplicates.noneInFilter: No identical clones — {count} retextured variant(s) hidden by the filter.
duplicates.noneInGender: No duplicates for this gender — check the other tab.
duplicates.panel.hint: Click a row to see the garment in the preview; ✓ keeps that copy and replaces the others with dummies (undoable).
duplicates.reveal: Reveal in the list (the window stays open)
duplicates.title: Duplicate garments
embedded.optimize.hint: Re-encodes the model’s embedded textures (DXT + mipmaps + power-of-two) directly inside the YDD
field.behaviourFlags.hint: Garment behaviour flags (docs.gta.clothing) — written to the YMT. Test in game.
field.hairScale.hint: Hair compression under the hat (prop expressionMods): light = -0.5, strong = -1. Prevents hair from clipping through the hat.
field.hairSwitch.hint: Interaction with vanilla hair (pedalternatevariations.meta): cut = beanie/mask, remove = full-face helmet.
field.highHeels.hint: Heel height (game units — DCT commonly uses 0.5 to 0.9). The preview floor lowers by the same amount to seat the sole.
field.label: Label
gamebuild.approximate: (community estimate — in-game testing remains the judge)
gamebuild.hint: The game has a fixed number of YMT slots per gender; every addon pack consumes some, replacements do not.
gamebuild.label: Server gamebuild
gamebuild.overflow: ⚠ YMT budget exceeded: the game will not load every pack. Reduce the addon packs or convert some to DLC replacements.
gamebuild.pick.hint: Select your server gamebuild to see the free YMT slots and how many more addon packs still fit.
gamebuild.remaining: ~{male} male / ~{female} female slot(s) left — about {packs} more male+female addon pack(s) still fit
gamebuild.replaceFree: DLC replacement packs consume no slot — that is the unlimited path.
gamebuild.usage: This bundle consumes {male} male slot(s) and {female} female slot(s) (1 YMT per gender per addon pack, +1 with heels or head props)
git.behind.hint: Pull them before continuing to avoid working on an outdated version of the pack.
git.behind.message: {count} team commit(s) have not been pulled on this machine yet.
git.behind.title: The repository is not up to date
git.init.hint: Creates the repository with Git LFS for the GTA binaries, keeps backups and originals versioned (the whole team can restore), ignores only the regenerable cache, then makes a first commit.
git.init.localOnly: Initialization is 100% local: no online repository is created, nothing leaves your machine at this step.
git.lfsMissing: Git LFS is not installed — required to version the GTA binary files (.ydd/.ytd). Install it from git-lfs.com then restart the application.
git.noRepo: This project is not a Git repository yet. Initialize it to version the pack (assets, backups and originals included) and work as a team.
git.notInstalled: Git is not installed on this machine (git.exe not found in PATH).
git.op.cancelled: Operation cancelled — the repository stays healthy, run it again whenever you want.
git.op.noRemote: Commit created — set a remote to push to the team.
git.op.pushed: Pushed successfully — the team is up to date.
git.op.remoteSet: Remote configured — "Push everything" will publish to it.
git.remote.create.hint: Or in one click with your authenticated CLI (the repository will be named "{name}") — the visibility is explicit on each button:
git.remote.create.noCli: Tip: with the GitHub (gh) or GitLab (glab) CLI authenticated, Vestium can create the repository in one click — private or public, you choose.
git.remote.setup.anyHost: Any host works: GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, self-hosted server… Create the repository there (private or public, your choice) then paste its URL here.
git.remote.setup.reassurance: Nothing is published without your consent: Vestium NEVER creates an online repository on its own and sends nothing until you click "Push everything". You alone choose the host and the visibility (private/public).
git.remote.setup.title: Connect a remote repository
git.state.clean: Up to date, nothing to push
git.step.staging: Staging files (LFS hashing of the assets)…
git.sync.hint: Saves everything in a commit, fetches the remote changes (rebase) then pushes — the one-click teamwork button.
git.title: Collaboration (Git)
heal.done: Letters repaired on {items} garment(s) — {matched} texture(s) realigned, {unmatched} without a match.
heal.none: Nothing to repair: the letters already match the original packs ({matched} checked).
heal.noOriginals: No recognizable texture in these folders — point at the original compiled packs.
heal.pick.title: Pick the ORIGINAL packs (compiled resource folders)
healYmt.done: Settings filled on {items} garment(s) — {heels} heel(s), {flags} flag(s), {hair} hair option(s). Values you already set were left untouched.
healYmt.none: Nothing to fill: the settings already match the original packs ({matched} garment(s) checked).
healYmt.noOriginals: No recognizable FiveM resource in these folders.
healYmt.pick.title: Pick the ORIGINAL packs (compiled resource folders)
home.engine.notBuilt: Engine not built — run "npm run engine:build" then restart the application.
home.engine.title: Engine
home.newBundle.desc: Several packs managed together: DLC replacements with Gen9 locking, automatic overflow, A→Z build
home.newProject.desc: A classic garment collection (addon or replacement)
home.openProject.desc: Resume an existing pack or bundle (.vestium)
home.recent.remove: Remove from the list (the project stays on disk)
home.recent.title: Recent projects
home.subtitle: GTA V / FiveM clothing creation tool
import.unresolved.orphan-linked: Linked file with no base model
inspector.geoms.hint: Geometry count = draw calls for this LOD (fewer is better)
inspector.load.heavy: Very heavy polygon load (> 40,000) — consider decimating the mesh
inspector.noDistantLod: No distant LOD (medium/low) — the model stays at full resolution at any distance.
list.empty: No items — import files or drag them here.
list.gen9.hint: Position reserved for consoles (Gen9 dummy): the PC version of the game does not accept any garment at this index. Vestium locks it to guarantee zero dead slots — it cannot be touched.
list.gen9.label: Gen9 reserved slot — {slot} {position}
list.sort.hint: Display order (build positions do not change)
list.sort.name: Sort: name
live.started: Image opened: every save updates the pack texture.
mass.allTextures.hint: Recompresses every YTD in the pack (auto DXT + mipmaps + power-of-two, 2048 px cap) — originals are backed up first and can be restored at any time
mass.embedded.hint: Re-encodes the problematic embedded textures directly inside the affected YDDs
mass.intro: Applies an action to all affected items in the pack. Metadata is refreshed at the end.
mass.lods.hint: Generates the distant LODs of every garment that has none (decimated via Blender if configured)
mass.log.done: Mass action "{action}" finished: {count} OK, {failures} failure(s), {seconds} s
mass.mips.hint: Regenerates only the mipmap chain of textures that lack one — original format kept, dimensions untouched (except non-pow2, adjusted for a clean chain)
mass.sortTextures.hint: Reorders the textures of every garment so the a/b/c… letters follow the filenames (fixes all "texture order" warnings at once) — instant
mass.textures.hint: Recompresses every YTD with at least one issue (pow2, mips, size, format) to DXT + mipmaps + power-of-two
mass.title: Mass actions
materials.embedded.empty: No embedded textures in this file.
materials.engineNotReady: Engine unavailable. Try again once the engine has started.
materials.replace.title: Choose an image for {name}
materials.title: Materials
meta.prefetch.hint: Models and textures are analyzed only once — everything will be instant afterwards.
meta.prefetch.title: Pack analysis
optimize.bulkHint: The options below will apply to all textures of the garment (preview: first texture)
optimize.pow2: Adjust width and height to power-of-two
optimize.title: Optimization options
original.confirm.message: The file "{name}" will be replaced by its original version (before any modification). Optimizations, LODs and edits applied to this file will be lost.
original.confirm.title: Restore the original?
original.hint: A copy of the original file was saved before the first modification — this button puts it back
original.missing: No original copy available for this file.
original.pristine: This file is still the original — the button will activate on the first modification (LOD, optimization, edit…)
original.selectTexture: Select a texture from the list to be able to restore it
outfit.missing: Not found in the base game — piece hidden
outfit.slot.head: Head
pick.importFiles.title: Import garment files
pick.importFolder.title: Import a folder
pick.parentDir.title: Choose the project parent folder
pick.physics.title: Attach a physics file
pick.projectFile.title: Open a Vestium project
pick.textures.title: Add textures
preview.anim.hint: Plays the game's idle animation on the character (extracted from your GTA V installation)
preview.bridgeMissing: Preview unavailable: the preload bridge is out of date.
preview.decimate.mode.aggressive.hint: Maximum reduction, only protects sharp edges — may distort the mesh
preview.decimate.mode.balanced.hint: Protects UV seams and sharp edges — a good compromise
preview.decimate.mode.label: Preset
preview.decimate.mode.quality.hint: Protects seams, sharp edges and materials + symmetry — silhouette and texture preserved as much as possible
preview.empty: Select a garment to display its 3D preview.
preview.engineNotBuilt: Engine not built — run "npm run engine:build" to enable the 3D preview.
preview.engineNotReady: The engine is not ready — the 3D preview will be available once the engine has started.
preview.lod.absent: This LOD is missing from the model
preview.lod.alreadyPresent: LODs were already present — information refreshed
preview.lod.generate.hint: Creates the missing distant LODs — decimated to 50/25/10% via Blender if configured, otherwise a copy of the high-quality mesh
preview.outfit.hint: Choose the garments worn by the preview character
preview.ped.hint: Shows the freemode character under the garment (extracted from your GTA V installation)
project.orphanDummiesPruned: {count} orphan dummy(ies) removed at open (left over from deleting set-aside items)
properties.author: Author
properties.dlcName.hint: Slug: lowercase, digits, underscore (3 to 50 characters)
properties.name: Project name
properties.replaceDeletedWithDummy: Replace a deleted item with a dummy (stable positions)
properties.title: Project properties
rename.label: New label
rename.title: Rename item
reopen.dlcAdopted: Project DLC name adopted from the resource: {dlc}
reopen.duplicates: {count} duplicate file(s) ignored (same position occupied twice in the resource)
reopen.gaps: {count} dummy(s) inserted to preserve the original positions
reopen.pick.title: Choose the FiveM resource folder (fxmanifest.lua + stream/)
reopen.skippedFiles: {count} metadata file(s) ignored (fxmanifest, .meta, .ymt — regenerated at build)
settings.blenderPath.hint: Optional — enables polygon reduction and decimated LOD generation (Blender ≥ 3.6).
settings.blenderPath.invalid: This file is not a Blender executable.
settings.gtaPath.hint: Used by the upcoming full-ped preview (local extraction, never redistributed).
settings.gtaPath.invalid: GTA5.exe not found in this folder.
settings.gtaPath.pick: Choose the GTA V installation folder (containing GTA5.exe)
settings.importWorkers.hint: Number of engine processes spawned in parallel for large imports (~120 MB of RAM each). Applied on the next import.
settings.language.hint: Applied immediately — the menu and the whole interface switch language.
settings.title: Preferences
settings.update.token.hint: GitHub token used to read the private repository’s releases (tip: "gh auth token"). Encrypted locally, never sent anywhere else.
slot.head: Head
status.bridgeMissing: Feature unavailable: the preload bridge is out of date.
status.dropUnsupported: Drag and drop unavailable: the preload bridge does not expose file paths yet.
texflag.huge.hint: 4K+ texture — excessive for a garment, reduce to 2048 max
texflag.no-mips.hint: No mipmaps — guaranteed shimmering at a distance
texflag.not-pow2.hint: Non power-of-two dimensions — the game expects 2ⁿ (512, 1024, 2048…)
texflag.oversized.hint: Larger than the recommended maximum (2048 px)
texflag.uncompressed.hint: Uncompressed texture — wasted memory weight, compress to DXT
texture.optimize.hint: Recompresses the texture (auto BC1/BC3, mipmaps, power-of-two) to reduce its size.
texture.optimizeAll.hint: Optimizes all textures of this garment (auto DXT + mipmaps + power-of-two, 2048 px cap) — originals are backed up first
update.readyMessage:
Vestium {version} has been downloaded.
Restart now to install it?
(Otherwise it will be installed when the application closes.)
update.tokenRequiredTitle: A GitHub token is required to read the private repository releases
validation.duplicate-pack-name: Two packs share the same name "{value}"
validation.duplicate-replace-target: DLC "{value}" is replaced by several packs — one pack per DLC only
validation.missing-replace-target: Pack "{packName}" does not target any DLC to replace
validation.model-invalid-shader: "{itemLabel}": shader "{shader}" not intended for a ped
validation.model-lod-same-poly: "{itemLabel}": distant LODs identical to the high LOD ({levels}) — decimate them for a real gain
validation.model-no-lod: "{itemLabel}": no distant LOD (create them from the preview)
validation.model-no-samplers: "{itemLabel}": no texture sampler defined in the shaders
validation.model-not-skinned: "{itemLabel}": mesh is not skinned — it will not follow the ped skeleton
validation.no-textures: "{itemLabel}": no texture attached — the build will declare 1 variation (the game will show the garment without a dedicated texture)
validation.pack-slot-overflow: Pack "{packName}": slot {slot} ({gender}) reaches {count} positions (max {max}, gen9 reservations included) — move garments to another pack
validation.reveal: Click to reveal the affected element
validation.texture-order-mismatch: "{itemLabel}": texture order does not follow the names (position {expected} = file "{found}") — the build would swap the variations, use "Sort by name"
validation.texture-ultra-hd: "{itemLabel}": texture {textureName} at {width}×{height} — 4K is excessive for a garment
validation.texture-zero-mipmaps: "{itemLabel}": texture {textureName} without mipmaps (shimmering at a distance)
validation.title: Project issues
validation.unexpected-asset: "{itemLabel}": a dummy must not reference any file
validation.unexpected-replace-target: Addon pack "{packName}" must not target a DLC
validation.unexpected-skin-type: "{itemLabel}": unexpected skin type for a prop
validation.ytd-extra-textures: "{itemLabel}": the YTD contains {count} textures (a single diffuse expected)
validation.ytd-oversize: "{itemLabel}": YTD of {sizeMb} MB (game limit 16 MB) — optimize the texture
vestfile.export.nothing: Select at least one real garment to export.
vestfile.export.pick: Pick the destination folder for the .vestfile files
vestfile.report.hint: {count} garment(s) placed — click a row to reveal the garment in the list.
vestfile.report.title: Imported garments
whatsnew.empty: Vestium has been updated to version {version}.
whatsnew.title: What's new in {version}
